---
name: "TH6 E1 — Task-Family Retrieval Policies"
about: "Implement TH6.E1 Task-Family Retrieval Policies"
labels: [epic, TH6, E1]
assignees: [copilot]
---

- [ ] US1 — Classify workflow-start tasks into kickoff families: assign delegated tasks to documented families and expose the selected family in machine-readable output.
- [ ] US2 — Enforce family-specific entity allowlists and suppressions: filter candidate entities by family policy before kickoff projection.
- [ ] US3 — Skip kickoff by default for reporting and synthesis tasks: abstain machine-readably while preserving workflow compatibility.

Full stories: `docs/themes/TH6-precision-governed-advisory-kickoff/epics/E1-task-family-retrieval-policies/stories/`
